arts.ttl: Raphinha appears to have risen in the captaincy ranks
arts.sum: However, against UD Las Palmas, Raphinha did not give De Jong the captain’s armband when the latter came on as a sub for FC Barcelona . The third-ranking player was Frenkie de Jong, with Raphinha fourth and Pedri fifth.

arts.ttl: Laporta and Barca working on options to register Olmo
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta is reportedly working hard on plans to try and register Dani Olmo for the rest of the season. Marca are now reporting that Laporta has a number of ideas to raise the funds needed to ensure Olmo can play for the first team in 2025.

arts.ttl: Ronald Araujo nearing return after completing training session
arts.sum: Araujo could also be used as a right-back, where Jules Koundé is the starter, but once again Barcelona lacks depth. Ronald Araujo is set to return to playing with FC Barcelona after an injury has kept him away from playing for a while now.

arts.ttl: Barca keeping tabs on Bundesliga hotshot Marmoush
arts.sum: Barca are said to really like Marmoush’s versatility, goalscoring and set-piece ability. Barcelona are said to be monitoring Eintracht Frankfurt star Omar Marmoush as the club think about the future and how to replace aging striker Robert Lewandowski.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Arsenal tipped to lock horns over signing of two strikers
arts.sum: Barcelona and Arsenal are ready to go head-to-head over the signings of a pair of high-profile attackers. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing sources from England, who point towards Alexander…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star emerges as transfer target for Serie A trio
arts.sum: A trio of Italian clubs are expressing a keen interest in the signature of Barcelona star Andreas Christensen. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing transfer insider Gianluca Di Marzio, who…

arts.ttl: Juventus and Inter Milan vying to sign Barcelona star next summer
arts.sum: In recent weeks, there has been a lot of speculation about the future of Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen. The 28-year-old has been out for the last four months with a troubling Achilles tendon injury, and during that period, his prominence within Can Barca has dropped significantly.
